overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival game showing a character walking along a rural mountain road at dusk. The character travels from a paved cliffside road past abandoned vehicles and a recreation area sign, then onto a dirt trail as ambient light increases toward the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: paved mountain road with rocky cliff face

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cliffside road with a melee weapon and backpack visible

entered.detail: steep rock wall running parallel to the road
wooden utility pole with power lines extending along the road
dense shrubs and tall grass along the roadside
paved two-lane road with yellow dividing lines

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow paved mountain road flanked by a steep rocky cliff on the right and dense vegetation on the left. Power lines run parallel to the road as dusk settles over the terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned vehicle parking area with recreation sign

events.description: character steps off the paved asphalt onto dirt shoulder near the recreation area sign

agents.ego_description: walking past abandoned vehicles toward the Bear Creek Hot Springs sign

entered.detail: cluster of derelict cars including a lime green SUV and silver sedan
wooden sign reading Bear Creek Hot Springs Recreation Area
lime green abandoned SUV parked by the roadside

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider area with abandoned vehicles parked along the road. The character passes a wooden sign for Bear Creek Hot Springs Recreation Area and steps onto the dirt shoulder, leaving the rocky cliff behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt trail through rocky mountain terrain

events.description: ambient light increases significantly as the sky brightens toward the horizon
approaching paved road intersection with yellow warning sign visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt trail toward the road intersection with pine trees visible ahead

entered.detail: massive boulders and rock outcroppings lining the dirt trail
yellow diamond-shaped road sign indicating curve or caution ahead
cluster of tall evergreen trees silhouetted against the brightening sky
unpaved sandy path winding through the rocky terrain

segments.scene_description: The character continues on a dirt trail surrounded by large rock formations as the sky brightens significantly. The path leads toward an intersection with a paved road, marked by a yellow warning sign and pine trees visible in the distance against the twilight sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey along a mountain road that transitions from a confined cliffside path into an open, rugged wilderness under a brightening twilight sky. It begins with the character walking a narrow paved road squeezed between a steep rocky cliff and dense vegetation beneath parallel power lines. As the road widens, the camera passes abandoned vehicles and a wooden sign for the Bear Creek Hot Springs Recreation Area before the character steps off the pavement onto a dirt shoulder. The scene then shifts into a dirt trail surrounded by towering rock formations, with the ambient light increasing significantly across the horizon. Finally, the path leads toward a distant intersection marked by a yellow warning sign and pine trees silhouetted against the glowing sky.
